steps.prompt: Press + on the {fruit_a_p} to make 3. Then look at the grid — can you just see it without counting?
steps.feedback: Three! In the grid, three makes a shape — you can learn to just know it. Tap the Total to check!
Three! Now add two more — make it 5!
Five! A full row in the grid. Look — can you see five without counting each one? Tap Total to check!
Five! When you know the number just by looking, that's called subitising. Your brain is getting fast!
